curation.synopsis: The isolated forge world of Diamantus faces annihilation as a warped space hulk — infested by the forces of Chaos and commanded by the datagnost Voldire, a disciple of the daemon-machine Vashtorr the Arkifane — bears down upon it. The battle-weary Carcharodons make their stand alongside the Adeptus Mechanicus, fighting through a rain of horrors to reach and destroy the hulk before Diamantus is lost. Amid the grinding war and an uneasy alliance with their tech-priest hosts, the void-born Space Marines are forced to confront their uncertain place within a changed and sundered Imperium.

flags.reason: roster lists no author for this title; Black Library and Goodreads credit Robbie MacNiven
2025 release with sparse plot coverage; only the antagonist Voldire is reliably named in available sources
